commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR forces Gemma models in the Google plugin onto `google-generative-ai` during dynamic model resolution and explicit provider config normalization, with a provider-policy regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. The PR discussion includes after-fix live output for the target Gemma path, and source inspection shows the remaining CLI-template and explicit-config routing failures without needing credentials.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are concrete Google provider routing defects with clear files and tests, and they do not require a product decision.

target.title: fix(google): route Gemma models through native Generative AI API
target.author: tanjinlimkelvin-dot

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
